findings.description: Error logged via AppLogger.error without telemetry context (missing payload_size or ssi).
findings.code_snippet: AppLogger.error('[Oracle53LiveStream] 0x53 frame transmit error', e instanceof Error ? e : new Error(String(e)), { fps: p53Fps })
findings.suggested_fix: Add { payload_size: number, ssi: number } to the error arguments context object.
